query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "redesign mixture-of-experts routers with manifold power iteration" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it provides an empirical study of the exact same mechanism (MoE routers) and variables (routing strategies like Token Choice vs. Expert Choice) that the user's question targets, even though it focuses on the computer vision domain rather than the specific "Manifold Power Iteration" method mentioned in the user's title. It serves as essential related work for understanding the landscape of router designs that the user's proposed method aims to improve
